description: Caddy Skillsmith framework: meta-framework for building Claude Code skills (12 slash commands)

script: if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'git clone failed. Ensure you are added as a collaborator to meetcaddy/skillsmith and your git CLI is authenticated (run: gh auth login).' }
if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Pop-Location; throw 'git checkout v0.1.0 SHA failed.' }

notes: Skillsmith framework files installed to: $(scoop prefix caddy-skillsmith)\share\caddy-skillsmith\
To activate in %USERPROFILE%\.claude\, run the caddy-link helper:
Commands installed (type /skillsmith: in Claude Code for the full menu):
PREREQUISITE: requires GitHub collaborator access to meetcaddy/skillsmith
(provisioned during Caddy onboarding) AND an authenticated git CLI
